theater_description: Countrywide aggregate row for the invasion and occupation period through the end of 2011.
geometry_method_note: National scope is explicit, so no subnational geometry issue arises.
military_area_note: No all-side combatant exposure denominator retained.
civilian_area_note: No person-month civilian exposure series retained in this retrofit because the necessary population-time series was not compiled from the retained source chain.
split_reason: Retains the broad conflictwide row as a summary anchor for sourced actor-attributed civilian subsets.
quality_note: Useful aggregate civilian totals and coalition-attributed subset, but no complete denominator system and no all-side combatant deaths.

theater_description: Opening invasion period through Baghdad's fall, aligned to IBC's 'first three weeks' figure.
geometry_method_note: National scope retained because the source itself reports a countrywide opening-phase toll.
split_reason: Preserved because it is the clearest Iraq row for coalition-attributed civilian deaths.
quality_note: Strong source-grounded attribution to US-led coalition for the opening phase, but no denominator system.

theater_description: IBC dossier window covering the invasion and first two occupation years.
geometry_method_note: National scope retained because the dossier is countrywide.
military_area_note: No all-side combatant exposure denominator retained.
civilian_area_note: No person-month civilian exposure denominator retained.
split_reason: Overlap with the invasion row is intentional because the dossier gives a distinctive attribution split for the combined 2003-2005 period.
quality_note: Strong civilian count and coalition-share attribution, but not enough for DR.

theater_description: Two-year high-violence phase identified in IBC's ten-years review.
geometry_method_note: National scope retained because the source describes a countrywide peak.
split_reason: Retained as the key late-occupation high-violence phase, but side attribution is left null because the retained total is not actor-separated.
quality_note: Important scale estimate but weak side attribution at episode-total level.

theater_description: Final two calendar years before and including US withdrawal.
geometry_method_note: National scope retained because the annual IBC figures are countrywide.
split_reason: Retained as a modest late-war row supported by separate annual civilian death counts.
quality_note: Annual civilian counts are usable, but actor separation and denominators remain incomplete.
